hardBlocks: CONTRADICTED [rt]: article states a Rotten Tomatoes score of NaN% — No verified Rotten Tomatoes score exists for Supergirl (OMDb returns none — common for TV/new titles). Do NOT state an RT percentage; speak qualitatively.

strengths: Accurate reporting of box office figures and comparisons.
Clear and concise structure with a strong lead and useful subheads.
Excellent information gain, providing context and analysis of the box office results.
Strong adherence to trade news standards for a box office report.
Well-written and engaging prose that maintains a professional tone.

weaknesses: The 'humanVoice' could be slightly more distinctive, though it is professional and authoritative.
